patches.name: Bypass Passport signature mismatch crash
patches.description: Strips the IllegalStateException + PassportRuntime handler block in c0.releaseRuntimeChecks (smali-aligned).

patches.name: Debuggable application manifest
patches.description: Sets android:debuggable=true on <application> (Passport allows non-Play signature on that path).

patches.name: Enable debug panel
patches.description: Unlocks the internal Maps-shell debug panel gate (Yandexoid prefs + swipable experiment).
